title: Digging Drill DataPack
description: This Adds A Digging Drill To Minecraft Use It To Drill Into The Ground Or Just Mine With It.
body:
- **[Read The Images]**
- **This Adds A Digging Drill To Minecraft Use It To Drill Into The Ground Or Just Mine With It.**

- You Can Use The Drill By Sneaking And Looking Straight Down
- Injoy This Everyone :)

Functions:
digging_drill:recipe This Will Give You The Digging Drill.
